name: Skim
description: Skim is a free, open source PDF reader and note-taker for macOS. It supports reading and annotating scientific papers in PDF format, but is also suitable for viewing any PDF file.
notes: Open source (BSD-style license). Uses Sparkle for in-app updates (SUFeedURL in app bundle), but the Sparkle feed URL is not publicly documented — SourceForge RSS is the reliable public endpoint. UNCERTAINTY: The regex pattern for extracting version from RSS item titles may need adjustment if SourceForge changes their naming convention.
